source_evidence.snippet: Owner lab baseline and recovery entry observation recorded ASUS RT-AX86U H/W Ver. 1.0 on ASUSWRT-Merlin 3004.388.11 entering a Rescue Mode-like state with Reset-held power-on, LAN1, slow-flashing power LED, and TTL=100 at 192.168.1.1.
source_evidence.notes: Personal testing source. Scope is limited to the tested RT-AX86U H/W Ver. 1.0 unit and ASUSWRT-Merlin firmware family.

source_evidence.snippet: Runtime attempt recorded successful Mac/App TFTP WRQ PUT to router 192.168.1.1:69, ACK block 0 from 192.168.1.1:69, no ephemeral server port observed, 86,900,756 bytes transferred, and firmware changed from 3004.388.11 to 3004.388.10_2 after post-upload wait and normal power cycle.
source_evidence.notes: Supports Passive TFTP PUT for the tested unit. Active TFTP router-pulls-firmware was not observed in passive capture.

source_evidence.snippet: Observation summary records upload completion as separate from recovery completion: after more than 5 minutes of waiting, DHCP did not return until a normal power cycle; after power cycle, DHCP/admin returned at 192.168.50.1 and configuration appeared retained in this single attempt.
source_evidence.notes: Configuration retention is this-run evidence only and must not be promised.

source_evidence.snippet: Claude Code review accepted RT-AX86U candidate draft preparation after Owner confirmation, with maximum confidence medium, all core groups observation-only, and no final profile authorization.
source_evidence.notes: Review report only. Does not approve final publication.

button_recovery.led_indicator: Slow-flashing power LED plus LAN1 activity was observed during the recovery-like state.

network_recovery.required_lan_port: LAN1 observed; other LAN ports were not evaluated.

tftp_details.client_behavior_requirement: Use Passive TFTP PUT/WRQ to 192.168.1.1:69 and follow the router ACK source port. In the observed run, ACKs stayed on source port 69.

known_successful_versions: ASUSWRT-Merlin 3004.388.10_2 to 3004.388.11 normal Web UI upgrade observed

firmware_source.version_selection_guidance: Use official ASUSWRT-Merlin firmware explicitly matching RT-AX86U. Extract the .w firmware image from the archive before TFTP upload.
firmware_source.risk_warning: This candidate evidence covers ASUSWRT-Merlin on one RT-AX86U H/W Ver. 1.0 unit. It does not prove stock ASUSWRT, other hardware revisions, other regions, or all firmware versions behave the same.

post_upload_behavior.user_warning_after_upload: Firmware upload finished, but recovery is not complete. Wait several minutes before any power action. In the observed run, DHCP and admin UI returned only after a normal power cycle, then the Mac used DHCP and opened the gateway 192.168.50.1.

known_recovery_variants: Configuration retained after TFTP recovery in this single RT-AX86U attempt
Manual power cycle required after post-upload wait before DHCP/admin returned

review_notes: Incoming candidate draft prepared after Owner confirmed the RT-AX86U 9-item checklist on 2026-05-26. This is not reviewed or final. All core groups remain observation-only. Do not promote without separate Owner approval.
notes: ASUS RT-AX86U H/W Ver. 1.0 owner-lab evidence shows Rescue Mode entry with Reset-held power-on, Passive TFTP PUT from Mac/App to router 192.168.1.1:69, fixed ACK source port 69 in the observed run, firmware write verified by downgrade from 3004.388.11 to 3004.388.10_2, and DHCP/admin return only after waiting more than 5 minutes and performing a normal power cycle. This draft is scoped to the tested unit and ASUSWRT-Merlin evidence only.
known_issues: Firmware version applicability is unknown; tested versions are recorded only in evidence and firmware_details.
Other RT-AX86U hardware revisions, regions, and firmware variants are unknown.
Web Recovery page was not observed during the tested TTL=100 state.
Active TFTP / router-pulls-firmware was not observed or supported by this evidence.
LAN1 was used successfully, but LAN2-LAN4 were not evaluated.
Exact button hold duration was not recorded.
TFTP filename requirement is unknown; 388102.w is only an accepted filename example.
Configuration retention was observed once but is not guaranteed.
risk_warnings: Upload completion does not mean recovery is complete.
Wait several minutes after upload before power action; the observed run waited more than 5 minutes.
A normal power cycle may be required before DHCP and admin UI return.
Configuration retention is not guaranteed. Back up configuration before recovery.
Do not judge recovery success by ping or TTL alone.
Web Recovery was not observed for this tested state.
Use Passive TFTP PUT only; Active TFTP router-pulls-firmware is not supported by this evidence.
Use model-matched official ASUSWRT-Merlin RT-AX86U firmware and extract the .w image before upload.
This candidate is not final and must not be generalized to RT-AC86U, stock ASUSWRT, other hardware revisions, or other regions.
